prerequisites.outro: are reviewed before choosing the setup mode.

setupMode.title: Choose a setup mode.
setupMode.subtitle: Configuration settings will be saved in User Settings.

express.title: EXPRESS
express.description: Fastest option. Automatically downloads and configures SiFli-SDK. Ideal for quick setup and immediate use.

advanced.title: ADVANCED
advanced.description: Configurable option. Choose SiFli SDK source (GitHub/Gitee), version or branch, and installation directory. Can select specific versions or development branches.

existing.title: USE EXISTING SETUP
existing.description: Use an existing SiFli SDK installation. Browse and select your existing SDK directory to configure the extension.

settings.destination: Installation directory will be automatically determined

underDevelopment.title: Under Development
underDevelopment.description: Advanced setup features are currently under development. Please use Express Setup for now to install SiFli SDK.
underDevelopment.suggestion: We recommend returning to the home page and selecting Express Setup for a complete installation experience.

features.customConfigurationDesc: Full control over SDK installation parameters

source.title: SDK Source
source.description: Choose where to download the SDK from

type.title: Download Type
type.description: Select release version or development branch

path.title: Installation Path
path.description: Select where to install the SDK

skipVerification.title: Skip file verification
skipVerification.description: Faster installation but may miss corrupted files

createShortcut.title: Create desktop shortcut
createShortcut.description: Add shortcut to desktop for quick access

addToPath.title: Add to system PATH
addToPath.description: Enable global access to SDK tools

existing.title: Use Existing Setup
existing.subtitle: Browse to your existing SiFli SDK installation

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.description: This feature will be available in a future update.

success.title: Installation Complete!
success.message: SiFli SDK has been successfully installed and configured.

installPath.label: Enter SiFli SDK container directory:
installPath.selectVersionHint: Please select a version or branch to see the complete installation path

toolchainSource.label: Toolchain download source:
toolchainSource.sifli: SiFli Mirror (Recommended for Chinese mainland users)

toolsPath.label: SiFli SDK Tools Directory (SIFLI_SDK_TOOLS_PATH):
toolsPath.description: Specify the installation directory path for SiFli SDK toolchain

analysis.title: Analysis Dashboard
analysis.noSuggestion: No extra suggestion is available for this item.
analysis.detailsPlaceholder: Select an error or warning on the left to show the full suggestion and related register here.

subtitle.inactive: No sifli-probe-rs debug session is currently available. Run analysis after the target is paused and the dashboard will mirror the latest errors and warnings.
subtitle.active: {chipText}, {deviceText}. The dashboard shares filter and view state with the debug sidebar.

empty.noSession: No debug session is currently available. Start and pause a sifli-probe-rs session before reviewing analysis results.
empty.noResults: No results are visible with the current filters.

instanceStatus.ok: No issues were found in the current analysis.
instanceStatus.notAnalyzed: No analysis result has been produced for this instance yet.
instanceStatus.issues: This instance has configuration issues that require attention.

debugSnapshot.title: Debug Snapshot Export
debugSnapshot.subtitle: Export memory regions and peripheral registers from the current debug session for offline analysis.

session.label: Debug Session
session.name: Session
session.notExportable: Export is not available for the current session.

output.label: Output Directory
output.placeholder: Click Browse to select an output directory…
